title: Gas Plant Operators
description: Distribute or process gas for utility companies and others by controlling compressors to maintain specified pressures on main pipelines.

tasks.text: Monitor equipment functioning, observe temperature, level, and flow gauges, and perform regular unit checks to ensure that all equipment is operating as it should.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Distribute or process gas for utility companies or industrial plants, using panel boards, control boards, and semi-automatic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Control operation of compressors, scrubbers, evaporators, and refrigeration equipment to liquefy, compress, or regasify natural gas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Control equipment to regulate flow and pressure of gas to feedlines of boilers, furnaces, and related steam-generating or heating equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record, review, and compile operations records, test results, and gauge readings such as temperatures, pressures, concentrations, and flows.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Determine causes of abnormal pressure variances, and make corrective recommendations, such as installation of pipes to relieve overloading.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust temperature, pressure, vacuum, level, flow rate, or transfer of gas to maintain processes at required levels or to correct problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other operators to solve unit problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor transportation and storage of flammable and other potentially dangerous products to ensure that safety guidelines are followed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start and shut down plant equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read logsheets to determine product demand and disposition, or to detect malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test gas, chemicals, and air during processing to assess factors such as purity and moisture content, and to detect quality problems or gas or chemical leaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean, maintain, and repair equipment, using hand tools, or request that repair and maintenance work be performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Signal or direct workers who tend auxiliary equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Control fractioning columns, compressors, purifying towers, heat exchangers, and related equipment to extract nitrogen and oxygen from air.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate gas ratios to detect deviations from specifications, using testing apparatus.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate construction equipment to install and maintain gas distribution systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
